description: 微信公众号/服务号图文发布流程（v1.7.28：登录后从首页 URL 提取 token 直接跳转编辑页，适配新版服务号左侧菜单；v1.7.27：发表需 3 步确认才能真正发出）

steps.descript: 导航到微信公众号主页
点击登录按钮
等待登录完成

steps.value: const tokenMatch = location.href.match(/token=([0-9a-fA-F]+)/) || document.documentElement.innerHTML.match(/token\s*[:=]\s*['"]([0-9a-fA-F]+)['"]/); const token = tokenMatch ? tokenMatch[1] : null; if (!token) throw new Error('未从页面提取到 token，无法直接打开编辑页'); const url = 'https://mp.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/appmsg?t=media/appmsg_edit_v2&action=edit&isNew=1&type=10&token=' + token + '&lang=zh_CN'; setTimeout(() => { window.location.href = url; }, 0); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, token, url });
steps.descript: v1.7.28：从首页 URL 提取 token，直接跳转新建图文编辑页（新版服务号/公众号左侧菜单结构变化，绕过内容管理/草稿箱/新的创作菜单点击）
等待跳转到编辑页（URL 含 appmsg_edit_v2）
等待编辑页加载（ProseMirror 初始化）

steps.value: const SELS = ['.weui-desktop-dialog', '.weui-desktop-modal', '[role="dialog"]', '.js_dialog', '.js_modal', '.weui-desktop-dialog__wrp', '.weui-desktop-modal__wrp', '[class*="modal"]', '[class*="dialog"]', '[class*="popup"]', '[class*="mask"]', '.tips_box', '.guide-popup', '.new-feature']; const BTNS_TEXT = ['我知道了', '知道了', '确定', '确认', '同意', '关闭', '取消', '暂不', '下次再说', '不再提示', '不再显示', '×', 'x', '关闭']; const BTNS_CLS = ['close', 'cancel', 'dismiss', 'js_close']; const dialogs = new Set(); for (const s of SELS) { document.querySelectorAll(s).forEach(d => dialogs.add(d)); } let closed = []; const allDialogInfo = []; for (const d of dialogs) { const r = d.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width <= 0 || r.height <= 0) continue; const cls = (d.className || '').slice(0, 80); const txt = (d.innerText || '').slice(0, 150).replace(/\s+/g, ' '); allDialogInfo.push({ cls, text: txt }); const btns = d.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], .weui-desktop-btn, .js_close, .close, .weui-desktop-icon-close, i[class*="close"]'); let btnClicked = false; for (const b of btns) { const t = (b.innerText || b.textContent || '').trim(); const c = (b.className || '').toLowerCase(); const isClose = BTNS_TEXT.some(k => t.includes(k)) || BTNS_CLS.some(k => c.includes(k)) || t === '×' || t === 'x'; if (isClose) { try { b.click(); closed.push(t || c.slice(0, 40)); btnClicked = true; break; } catch {} } } if (!btnClicked) { const closeIcons = d.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-icon-close, i[class*="close"], [class*="close-btn"], [aria-label*="close"], [aria-label*="关闭"]'); for (const ic of closeIcons) { try { ic.click(); closed.push('icon:' + (ic.className || '').slice(0, 40)); btnClicked = true; break; } catch {} } } } return JSON.stringify({ dialogCount: allDialogInfo.length, dialogs: allDialogInfo, closedCount: closed.length, closed });
steps.descript: 关闭公告/引导/协议弹窗（覆盖 weui-desktop-dialog/modal/popup/mask 等，点击 我知道了/确定/关闭/×/取消）
等待弹窗关闭动画

steps.value: const pm = document.querySelectorAll('.ProseMirror'); const titlePm = document.querySelector('.ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"][data-placeholder="请在这里输入标题"]'); const bodyPm = document.querySelector('.view.rich_media_content .ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"]'); const titleInput = document.querySelector('#title, input.js_title, textarea.js_title'); const ueditor = document.querySelector('#ueditor_replace, .edui-body-container, .ql-editor'); const layout = document.querySelector('.weui-desktop-layout__main'); const editor = document.querySelector('.appmsg_editor'); const info = { url: location.href, viewport: { w: window.innerWidth, h: window.innerHeight }, pmCount: pm.length, pmClasses: Array.from(pm).map(e => (e.className||'').slice(0,80)), titlePm: titlePm ? { rect: titlePm.getBoundingClientRect(), visible: titlePm.offsetWidth > 0 } : null, bodyPm: bodyPm ? { rect: bodyPm.getBoundingClientRect(), visible: bodyPm.offsetWidth > 0 } : null, titleInput: titleInput ? { tag: titleInput.tagName, id: titleInput.id, cls: (titleInput.className||'').slice(0,60) } : null, ueditor: ueditor ? { tag: ueditor.tagName, id: ueditor.id, cls: (ueditor.className||'').slice(0,60) } : null, layout: layout ? layout.getBoundingClientRect() : null, editor: editor ? editor.getBoundingClientRect() : null }; return JSON.stringify(info);
steps.descript: 诊断编辑页布局（打印 URL/viewport/ProseMirror/title/ueditor 等元素位置，排查 Worker 浏览器布局差异）

steps.value:
const titlePm = document.querySelector('.ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"][data-placeholder="请在这里输入标题"]'); const titleTa = document.querySelector('#title'); const TITLE = ARG || ''; const result = { titlePm: !!titlePm, titleTa: !!titleTa, titleLen: TITLE.length }; if (titlePm) { titlePm.focus(); const r = titlePm.getBoundingClientRect(); result.titlePmRect = { x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; result.titlePmVisible = r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; titlePm.innerHTML = ''; document.execCommand('selectAll', false, null); document.execCommand('insertText', false, TITLE); if (titlePm.innerText.trim().length === 0) { titlePm.innerHTML = '

' + TITLE + '

'; } // 触发完整事件序列，确保 React state 同步 ['input','keyup','keydown','change','blur'].forEach(evt => { titlePm.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', { bubbles: true, inputType: 'insertText', data: TITLE })); titlePm.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup', { bubbles: true, key: TITLE.slice(-1) || 'a' })); }); titlePm.blur(); result.titleFilled = true; result.actualText = titlePm.innerText.trim().slice(0, 50); } if (titleTa) { titleTa.value = TITLE; titleTa.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); titleTa.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); titleTa.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur', { bubbles: true })); result.titleTaFilled = true; } return JSON.stringify(result);
steps.descript: 填写文章标题并触发完整输入事件（input/keyup/change/blur），确保 React state 同步
输入作者

steps.value: const bodyPm = document.querySelector('.view.rich_media_content .ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"]'); const ueditor = document.querySelector('#ueditor_replace'); const CONTENT = ARG || ''; const result = { bodyPm: !!bodyPm, ueditor: !!ueditor, contentLen: CONTENT.length }; if (bodyPm) { bodyPm.focus(); const r = bodyPm.getBoundingClientRect(); result.bodyPmRect = { x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; result.bodyPmVisible = r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; bodyPm.innerHTML = ''; document.execCommand('selectAll', false, null); document.execCommand('insertHTML', false, CONTENT); if (bodyPm.innerText.trim().length === 0) { bodyPm.innerHTML = CONTENT; } // 触发完整事件序列，确保 React state 同步 for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) { bodyPm.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', { bubbles: true, inputType: 'insertFromPaste', data: CONTENT.slice(0, 100) })); bodyPm.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup', { bubbles: true, key: 'Enter' })); } bodyPm.blur(); result.bodyFilled = true; result.actualLen = bodyPm.innerText.trim().length; } else if (ueditor) { ueditor.innerHTML = CONTENT; ueditor.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); ueditor.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); ueditor.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur', { bubbles: true })); result.ueditorFilled = true; } return JSON.stringify(result);
steps.descript: 输入正文并触发完整输入事件（input/keyup/change/blur），确保 React state 同步
等待正文图片渲染完成（用于'从正文选择'封面）

steps.value: const fromContentBtn = document.querySelector('a.js_selectCoverFromContent'); if (!fromContentBtn) throw new Error('未找到 从正文选择 按钮'); fromContentBtn.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); fromContentBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); const dialogs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog')); const dialog = dialogs.find(d => (d.innerText || '').includes('选择图片') && (d.innerText || '').includes('正文') && d.offsetWidth > 0); if (!dialog) throw new Error('未弹出选择图片弹窗（dialogCount=' + dialogs.length + '）'); const imgSpans = Array.from(dialog.querySelectorAll('.appmsg_content_img_list .appmsg_content_img_item')).filter(el => { const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; }); if (imgSpans.length === 0) throw new Error('弹窗内无可选图片: ' + dialog.innerHTML.slice(0, 1000)); const firstItem = imgSpans[0]; const r = firstItem.getBoundingClientRect(); window.__jlyl_cover_img_x = r.x + r.width / 2; window.__jlyl_cover_img_y = r.y + r.height / 2; return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, count: imgSpans.length, x: window.__jlyl_cover_img_x, y: window.__jlyl_cover_img_y, rect: { x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) } });
steps.descript: 点击 从正文选择 按钮（JS click 有效），获取第一张图片的坐标供下一步真实点击
真实点击第一张图片（Playwright mouse.click，触发 React 合成事件，JS click 无法选中图片）

steps.value: const li = document.querySelector('.appmsg_content_img_list .appmsg_content_img_item'); const mask = li && li.querySelector('.card_mask_global'); const nextBtn = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog__ft button')).find(b => (b.innerText||'').trim() === '下一步' && b.offsetWidth > 0); const selected = li && li.className.includes('selected'); const maskVisible = mask && (mask.offsetWidth > 0 || mask.offsetHeight > 0); if (!selected && !maskVisible) throw new Error('图片未选中（li.cls=' + (li?li.className:'null') + ' mask=' + (mask?mask.offsetWidth:'null') + '）'); if (!nextBtn) throw new Error('未找到下一步按钮'); if (nextBtn.classList.contains('weui-desktop-btn_disabled')) throw new Error('下一步按钮仍禁用'); nextBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const dialogs2 = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog')).filter(d => d.offsetWidth > 0); const editDialog = dialogs2.find(d => (d.innerText || '').includes('编辑封面') || (d.innerText || '').includes('确认')); if (!editDialog) throw new Error('未弹出编辑封面弹窗（visible=' + dialogs2.length + ' texts=' + JSON.stringify(dialogs2.map(d => (d.innerText||'').trim().slice(0,80))) + '）'); const confirmBtn = Array.from(editDialog.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => (b.innerText||'').trim() === '确认' && b.offsetWidth > 0 && !b.classList.contains('weui-desktop-btn_disabled')); if (!confirmBtn) throw new Error('未找到确认按钮: ' + JSON.stringify(Array.from(editDialog.querySelectorAll('button')).map(b => ({t:(b.innerText||'').trim(), disabled:b.classList.contains('weui-desktop-btn_disabled')})))); confirmBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); const coverArea = document.querySelector('#js_cover_area'); const preview = coverArea && coverArea.querySelector('.js_cover_preview_new'); const bgImg = preview && preview.style.backgroundImage; const coverSet = preview && bgImg && bgImg !== 'url(

)' && bgImg !== 'url()'; if (!coverSet) throw new Error('封面未设置成功: previewDisplay=' + (preview?preview.style.display:'null') + ' bg=' + (bgImg?bgImg.slice(0,100):'null')); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, coverSet: true, bgImg: bgImg.slice(0, 150) });
steps.descript: 点击下一步 → 等待编辑封面弹窗 → 点击确认 → 验证封面设置成功（检查 preview background-image 有值）

branch_steps.selector: //div[text()="声明原创成功后将获得平台著作权保护，并有可能得到推荐"]

steps.descript: 声明原创分支

steps.value: const btns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, .weui-desktop-btn, a.weui-desktop-btn, span.weui-desktop-btn')); const publishBtn = btns.find(b => { const t = (b.innerText||'').trim(); return t === '发表' || t === '无需声明并发表' || t === '群发'; }); if (!publishBtn) return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, reason: '未找到发表按钮', buttonTexts: btns.map(b => (b.innerText||'').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 20) }); publishBtn.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); return new Promise(r => setTimeout(() => { publishBtn.click(); r(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, clicked: (publishBtn.innerText||'').trim(), rect: publishBtn.getBoundingClientRect() })); }, 500));
steps.descript: 点击发表（evaluate_edit: scrollIntoView + click，解决按钮在视口外 Playwright click 失效问题）
等待发表声明弹窗

steps.value: await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); const dialogs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog, .weui-desktop-modal')).filter(d => d.offsetWidth > 0); const dialogTexts = dialogs.map(d => (d.innerText||'').trim()); // 1. 新版'声明创作来源'弹窗：点击'无需声明并发表' const sourceDialog = dialogs.find(d => { const t = (d.innerText||'').trim(); return t.includes('创作来源') || t.includes('无需声明并发表') || t.includes('去声明'); }); if (sourceDialog) { const noDeclareBtn = Array.from(sourceDialog.querySelectorAll('button, a, [role=button]')).find(b => { const t = (b.innerText||'').trim(); return t.includes('无需声明并发表') && b.offsetWidth > 0; }); if (noDeclareBtn) { noDeclareBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'no_declare_publish', clicked: '无需声明并发表' }); } } // 2. 旧版'同意以上声明'弹窗 const allEls = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, a, .weui-desktop-btn, [role=button]')); const agreeBtn = allEls.find(el => { const t = (el.innerText||'').trim(); return t === '同意以上声明' && el.offsetWidth > 0; }); if (agreeBtn) { agreeBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'agree_statement', clicked: '同意以上声明' }); } // 3. 已直接到群发通知弹窗 const publishDialog = dialogs.find(d => (d.innerText||'').includes('群发通知') && (d.innerText||'').includes('发表')); if (publishDialog) { return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'already_at_publish_dialog', msg: '声明弹窗已关闭，直接到群发通知弹窗' }); } // 4. 已直接到继续发表弹窗 const continueDialog = dialogs.find(d => (d.innerText||'').includes('继续发表')); if (continueDialog) { return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'already_at_continue', msg: '已直接到继续发表弹窗' }); } return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, step: 'no_statement', dialogs: dialogTexts.map(t => t.slice(0, 80)) });
steps.descript: 处理发表后弹窗：新版点击'无需声明并发表'，旧版点击'同意以上声明'，或已直接进入群发通知/继续发表弹窗
等待群发通知弹窗

steps.value: await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); const dialogs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog, .weui-desktop-modal')).filter(d => d.offsetWidth > 0); const publishDialog = dialogs.find(d => (d.innerText||'').includes('群发通知') && (d.innerText||'').includes('发表')); if (!publishDialog) { const continueDialog = dialogs.find(d => (d.innerText||'').includes('继续发表')); if (continueDialog) return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'already_at_continue', msg: '已在继续发表弹窗，跳过群发通知' }); const verifyDialog = dialogs.find(d => (d.innerText||'').includes('微信验证') || (d.innerText||'').includes('扫码')); if (verifyDialog) return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'weixin_verify', msg: '已到微信验证步骤' }); return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, step: 'no_publish_dialog', dialogCount: dialogs.length, texts: dialogs.map(d => (d.innerText||'').trim().slice(0, 80)) }); } const publishBtn = Array.from(publishDialog.querySelectorAll('button, a')).find(b => (b.innerText||'').trim() === '发表' && b.offsetWidth > 0); if (!publishBtn) return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, step: 'no_publish_btn', btns: Array.from(publishDialog.querySelectorAll('button, a')).map(b => (b.innerText||'').trim()) }); publishBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'clicked_publish_in_dialog', clicked: '发表' });
steps.descript: 点击群发通知弹窗的发表按钮（若已跳过到继续发表/微信验证，则直接返回成功）
等待继续发表确认弹窗

steps.value: await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const dialogs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog, .weui-desktop-modal')).filter(d => d.offsetWidth > 0); const continueDialog = dialogs.find(d => (d.innerText||'').includes('继续发表')); if (!continueDialog) { const hasWeixinVerify = (document.body.innerText||'').includes('微信验证') || (document.body.innerText||'').includes('扫码'); if (hasWeixinVerify) return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'weixin_verify', msg: '已到微信验证步骤（需管理员扫码），发表动作已触发' }); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'no_continue_dialog', msg: '无继续发表弹窗，可能已发表或需验证', dialogCount: dialogs.length, texts: dialogs.map(d => (d.innerText||'').trim().slice(0, 80)) }); } const continueBtn = Array.from(continueDialog.querySelectorAll('button, a')).find(b => (b.innerText||'').trim() === '继续发表' && b.offsetWidth > 0); if (!continueBtn) return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, step: 'no_continue_btn', btns: Array.from(continueDialog.querySelectorAll('button, a')).map(b => (b.innerText||'').trim()) }); continueBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'clicked_continue_publish', clicked: '继续发表' });
steps.descript: 点击继续发表确认按钮
等待发表动作完成

steps.value: const url = window.location.href; const stillOnEditPage = url.includes('appmsg_edit_v2'); const bodyText = document.body.innerText || ''; const hasWeixinVerify = bodyText.includes('微信验证') || bodyText.includes('扫码后'); const hasSuccess = bodyText.includes('发表成功') || bodyText.includes('已发表'); const errorEls = document.querySelectorAll('.js_error_msg, .weui-desktop-toast--warn, .frm_msg.fail, .js_cover_error, .weui-desktop-toast--error, .weui-desktop-toast__content'); const errors = Array.from(errorEls).map(e => (e.innerText || e.textContent || '').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 3); if (stillOnEditPage && !hasWeixinVerify && !hasSuccess) { throw new Error('发表后 URL 仍为编辑页（appmsg_edit_v2），发表动作未触发。错误提示: ' + (errors.join('; ') || '无')); } return JSON.stringify({ url, hasWeixinVerify, hasSuccess, errors });
steps.descript: 验证发表成功（URL 跳转离开 appmsg_edit_v2 或出现微信验证/发表成功提示）
